about.title: About BABYLOVE
about.subtitle: Redefining modern fashion through craftsmanship, sustainable fabrics, and timeless silhouettes.
about.storyText1: BABYLOVE was founded with a clear conviction: that modern fashion should be intentional, sustainable, and built to last. Every garment is designed with the finest materials — Italian wools, Japanese denims, and Mongolian cashmere — and constructed with techniques that honor traditional craftsmanship.
about.storyText2: What began as a small atelier in Germany has grown into a global destination for those who refuse to compromise on quality. Our collections are deliberately small, seasonally relevant, and designed to work together as a curated wardrobe.

values.qualityDesc: Every stitch, every fabric, every finish is selected to meet the highest standards of modern tailoring.
values.sustainabilityDesc: Sustainable materials, ethical production, and thoughtful packaging — because great style shouldn't cost the earth.
values.communityDesc: A worldwide community of discerning individuals who share our vision of intentional, elevated living.
values.trustDesc: Transparent pricing, honest craftsmanship, and a 100% satisfaction guarantee on every piece.

about.teamTitle: Meet the People Behind the Brand
about.ctaDesc: Explore our curated collections and find pieces that define your personal style.
